structured_content.text: The premise of Puck’s inaugural Stories of the Season event was to elevate the often dry and predictable awards season conversation series, and whether it was Peter’s riveting conversation with actors Jeremy Strong, Zoe Saldaña, and Peter Sarsgaard, or Matt Belloni’s keynote conversations with up-and-coming star Mikey Madison and Dune director Denis Villeneuve, the evening more than delivered on that promise.

Earlier this month, in front of a packed
audience of awards season voters at The Brownstone in Los Angeles, four of Puck’s A-list journalists— Matthew Belloni , Lauren Sherman , Peter Hamby , and Baratunde Thurston —took the stage to conduct a series of intimate conversations with a slate of the season’s most distinguished filmmakers, costume designers, and actors. The premise of Puck’s inaugural Stories of the Season event was to elevate the
often dry and predictable awards season conversation series, and whether it was Peter’s riveting conversation with actors Jeremy Strong , Zoe Saldaña , and Peter Sarsgaard , or Matt Belloni ’s keynote conversations with up-and-coming star Mikey Madison and Dune director Denis Villeneuve , the evening more than delivered on that promise. If you weren’t able to attend, you can
watch video replays of the panel conversations by clicking on the links below. The evening was presented in partnership with Polestar, and supported by Mayer Brown, Wondery, and HBO and Max. Event Lineup Keynote Q&A: A Live Recording of ‘The Town’ HOSTED BY MATTHEW BELLONI An exclusive and intimate
conversation between Matt Belloni and Dune filmmaker Denis Villeneuve about his unique process and how he views the evolution of the entertainment business. The Keynote Q&A was followed by the Breakthrough Performer Q&A with actress Mikey Madison of Anora . Both conversations were recorded for an episode of The Town . SPEAKERS Denis
Villeneuve , Mikey Madison WATCH THE CONVERSATION Going There: The Fearless Performances HOSTED BY PETER HAMBY Peter
Hamby brought together three standout actors— Peter Sarsgaard , Jeremy Strong , and Zoe Saldaña —whose performances made particularly bold statements about the world. They discussed their creative process, how they choose their roles, and how their movies engage with real-life narratives and the broader culture. SPEAKERS Peter
Sarsgaard , Jeremy Strong , Zoe Saldaña WATCH THE CONVERSATION Stranger Than Fiction: The Documentary Truth Tellers HOSTED BY BARATUNDE THURSTON An A-list documentary
filmmaker panel moderated by Baratunde Thurston , featuring the creative minds behind the stories that are moving the culture, shining a light on crucially important issues, and illuminating some of the darkest corners of the planet. SPEAKERS Josh
Greenbaum , Morgan Neville , Matt Tyrnauer , Shiori Ito SUPPORTED BY WATCH THE
CONVERSATION Slaying the Screen: The Fashion and Costumes of the Season HOSTED BY LAUREN SHERMAN Lauren
Sherman gathered four of the top costume designers in awards contention for a lively chat about the fashion behind some of the season’s most talked-about films. They discussed creating the look and feel of the films, their relationships with filmmakers, and how they worked with stars to create the year’s most iconic looks. SPEAKERS Virginie
Montel , Janty Yates , Colleen Atwood , Jonathan Anderson WATCH THE CONVERSATION Thanks to our sponsors PRESENTED BY SUPPORTED BY Need help? Review our FAQ page or contact us for assistance. For brand partnerships, email ads@puck.news . You received this email because you signed up to receive emails from Puck, or as part of your Puck account associated with puck@khamel.com.
